name: HubSpot Social Media Software
highlight_text: Best for integrating social with other marketing tools
description:
What HubSpot Does

Surprised to see this one here? While HubSpot offers best of breed CRM software, their marketing hub has tools to cater to every marketing need, including social media. Brands that are already using HubSpot’s products will find their social media software easy to run and integrate with their tools. However, for people new to HubSpot, it may be hard to justify the cost of running and setting it up.

‍

Key Features

  • Simplify your workflow by batch-creating posts and planning social media campaigns weeks or months in advance. 
  • Monitor and track relevant keywords to stay informed about what people are saying about your brand, industry, or topics of interest.
  • Manage all aspects of your social media presence from a single platform, including post creation, scheduling, automation, and campaign management.
  • Collaborative Workflows – foster collaboration among team members by facilitating review and approval processes. 
  • CRM Integration – seamlessly integrate social media data with HubSpot's Customer Relationship Management (CRM) system. 
  • Manage and optimize social media advertising campaigns directly from the HubSpot platform

Benefits of HubSpot Social Media Software

  • Enabling a more holistic view of your customer interactions and engagement
  • Ensuring consistent messaging and quality control
  • Ability to plan ahead and build a consistent and well-organized content strategy.
  • Streamlining your paid social media efforts

Pricing

Starts at $20 per month per user, but for professional plans can cost even as much as $890 per month

Pros

✅Easily scalable

✅Offers integration with other marketing tools, including CRMs like Salesforce

Cons

❌Limited features as compared to other social media platforms

❌Hard to transition if you’re not using other HubSpot features

❌Compatible with only four platforms, which is highly limiting

‍
